title: MyGlamm Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: MyGlamm Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
MyGlamm Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MyGlamm Global Group:
MyGlamm Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm Global Group!
